---
title: "What I'm currently working on"
---

## 2024-11-15
I'm currently working on migrating my website from Hugo to Quarto.
Aside from that, I'm making preparations to head back to the US, sadly. Once I'm there I plan on:

* working on a secret side project with my brother
* kickstarting my Mandarin learning journey
* preparing for next year when I return to Korea and find an apartment
